notes: SB 1383 establishes a statewide target to reduce disposal of organic waste 75 percent below the 2014 level by 2025.

source_organization: California Department of Resources Recycling and Recovery
notes: CalRecycle clarifies that the 20 percent edible-food-recovery target by 2025 is a statewide goal, not an individual jurisdiction quota.
Regulations adopted under PRC 42652.5 take effect on or after January 1, 2022.

source_organization: California Department of Resources Recycling and Recovery
notes: Each jurisdiction's procurement target is calculated as population multiplied by 0.08 tons of organic waste per resident per year; the 2022 target remains in effect through December 31, 2026.

source_organization: California Department of Resources Recycling and Recovery
notes: Jurisdictions must implement inspection and enforcement programs to ensure organic waste generators comply with SB 1383 requirements.
